title: クールでホットな姉妹

text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and I are heading back from an
outing, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Teach! Why don't we drop by that diner?
You know, the one that had an ad in front of the
station?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I've been thinkin' about the homework my
dad gave me. Maybe eatin' some good ol'
American food will help inspire an answer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I really wanna figure out what the most important
thing about cooking is!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's see, what should I order... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian, I understand you're not a fan of
vegetables, but have some carrot juice at the
very least.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Worry about yourself. I can decide what I want to eat on my own.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Brian and Hayahide! What're the
odds?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Hishiama and her trainer. Hello there. I
suppose you two are also having lunch?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Say hello, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ama, could you get her to pipe down? She
doesn't realize how annoying she can be
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm annoying now? Good nutrition should be
paramount with your next race being so close...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's enough of that. Why don't we all
just sit together and eat in harmony?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm stuffed! There wasn't a bad dish in
sight!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It all tasted great, but...
choice_data_list: Were you able to figure anything out?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, not at all. Guess it's gonna take a lot more
than that to take care of my homework...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Homework? Since when do you care about that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Wait, did you eat something bad?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You just saw me eat nothin' but tasty barbecue!
The reason is—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wait, hang on! Maybe you two can help me out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What do you think is the most important thing
about cooking?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing about cooking? I can't
say this is familiar territory for me, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think the recipe is the most important thing. It
provides a basic formula upon which adjustments
can be made via fine calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see it as the foundation and application of
cooking.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's stupid. Food's good enough as long as it's
edible.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But we are what we eat, so I'd rather throw
together whatever's gonna get me fired up for
races.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... Y'know, for sisters, you two sure
think differently.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide keeps things cool and collected, while
Brian likes heat-of-the-moment decisions!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I could learn a thing or two from both ways
of doing things, but I think the one that resonates
most with me is...
choice_data_list: Keeping it cool with the right techniques.
Turning up the heat and challenging new things.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good thinking, Teach! I can't really wrap my
head around the smaller details, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The recipe comes first! I'll just have to follow one
and see how it goes! Thanks for the help, you two!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We hardly did anything worthy of such thanks.
We wish you well in your endeavors.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Don't lump me in with you.

We return to the academy together, but Hishi
Amazon asks me to wait in my office.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting, Teach. I whipped this up using
some cool techniques!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's a chilled tomato and basil pasta. Eat up
before it gets warm!

I take my first mouthful of the pasta, and the
crisp, umami flavor of the vegetables fills my
senses.
choice_data_list: It's light, refreshing, and tastes wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you like it! I usually season food based
on my instincts.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But it was great to go back to the basics and
measure everything down to the gram!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Now I'm one step closer to cracking the
puzzle.

Hishi Amazon puts on a cool expression and nods
her head sagely.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Good thinking, Teach! I'm really gonna throw
myself into this whole thing...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And pour my heart and soul into my cooking once
we get back home! I owe you guys one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I still don't get what you're talking about... but
sure, good luck. Here, take this carrot juice for
the road.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Don't use this as an opportunity to push your
juice on her, Brian.

We return to the academy together, but Hishi
Amazon asks me to wait in my office.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting, Teach. I made sure my soul
was burnin' hot while I whipped this up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! Spicy stir-fried shrimp, straight outta the
pan! Eat up before it gets cold!
choice_data_list: Thanks! I'll dig in right away.

text_block_list.text:
I try the stir-fried shrimp, and the sauce's wild,
spicy tang fills my mouth.
choice_data_list: It's so spicy... but so good!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you like it! I'm usually pretty
light-handed when it comes to seasoning rich
dishes like these.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But it's not so bad to go all-out with the bold
flavors in order to match people's taste
preferences!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! We're one step closer to answering the
question!

Hishi Amazon pumps her fists triumphantly in the
air with more fire burning in her eyes than usual.
